meaning: Institution of Electrical Engineers(英国)电机工程师协会
examples: Objective To evaluate the application value intraoperative epicardial echocardiography (IEE) in cardiac surgery.
The seismic assessment and strengthening renovation for the teaching building, office building of Beijing University, completed by IEE.
